eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 10:53 AM ON MAR 11, 2026 Effective until 01:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Local AMBER Alert: Missing Child from Pearland, Texas. Missing child is Skyler Hopson, 7 year old black female last seen wearing a pink and white tie dye dress. Call Pearland Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1 Local AMBER Alert: Missing Child from Pearland, Texas. Missing child is Skyler Hopson, 7 year old black female last seen wearing a pink and white tie dye dress. Call Pearland Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1. 
To view all active alerts, click here: https://txsubscribealerts.dps.texas.gov/alerts
